2026-04-20T11:49:43.9658555Z [36;1m# Derive GH_HOST from GITHUB_SERVER_URL so the gh CLI targets the correct[0m
2026-04-20T11:49:43.9659568Z [36;1m# GitHub instance (GHES/GHEC). On github.com this is a harmless no-op.[0m
